purpose: Tier-II cross-BUILD memory (factory self-host) — one line per emitted harness; recall before authoring a new graph

sections.runs/index.jsonl: thin append-only probe; one line per harness BUILD. Grep it, then Read only matched runs/<build_id>/.
sections.domain-knowledge.yaml: IMMORTAL build knowledge: domain -> topology/tier/mechanism patterns, reused when authoring a new graph.
sections.risk/decisions.jsonl: IMMORTAL standing build decisions / anti-patterns (e.g. 'workflow.js retired', 'all-6 floor', 'presence != wiring').

query_recipe: Grep '<domain tokens>' .harness/memory/runs/index.jsonl -> Read .harness/memory/runs/<build_id>/* on a hit only
